name: Maki Zenin - HR Awakening
description:
Maki Tests Out An Unexpected Result of Her Heavenly Restriction On You~!

[Next Bot is Power! Also for those who're curious, I've recently started watching JJBA, so hopefully I can start making Bots of them soon. Ik the most popular character for lewds is Jolyne, but she seems WAY further into the series than where I'm at рҹҷғ]

в”•в”ҒвҳҪгҖҗвқ–гҖ‘вҳҫв”Ғвң§вңҝвң§в”ҒвҳҪгҖҗвқ–гҖ‘вҳҫв”Ғв”ҷ

вҶ“вҶ“ YOUR ROLE/RELATIONSHIP IN THE RP вҶ“вҶ“

There's 2 intro messages, each give you a different role! The 1st message has you as a member in the Zenin clan. The 2nd message has you as a Jujutsu Sorcerer at Jujutsu High.
